title: Stardew Paintings
description: A collection of Stardew Valley paintings that replaces all vanilla and unused paintings.
body:
# Stardew Paintings

## About

This is a resource pack that replaces all vanilla and unused paintings with ones from and inspired by Stardew Valley. Some artwork was changed or altered entirely to fit the boundaries of Minecraft Paintings. All artwork is from Stardew Valley and some paintings are entirely new using stardew's sprites.

Currently updated for 1.20

## Credit
Note: This mod is not affiliated with or endorsed by ConcernedApe, the developer of Stardew Valley. It is a fan-made creation using paintings from the game. Source: https://stardewvalleywiki.com/Furniture

![Collage of all art included](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17c1d881032650adfdd5399c5d0a31e7757d41df.png)
